text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fall series has begun. All of El Condor Pasa's
rivals have grown stronger and are off to fine
starts.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Graaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Special Week! Special Week makes a
sweeping victory in the first race of the fall!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's overtaken the competition with a late surge
on the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll pass anyone in front of me! Even Suzuka and
El!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This racer isn't just a cutie anymore! With guts
and an outstanding fighting spirit, she's coming
for the top spot in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Grass Wonder wins! Her steadfast
performance and serene spirit kept all the other
runners at bay and secured victory!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I can only be brave and keep moving forward.
This fall, I'm searching for even higher ideals.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Such perfection! Can anyone bring down this
sturdy fortress this autumn?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although, it should be noted that the crowd's
enthusiasm this fall is certainly higher than other
years.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's all thanks to a specially planned event
by El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Spe! Grass! Our special performance is finally
starting!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All of our practice—all that dancing and
singing—has all lead up to this moment!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's right, El! This is exactly what we've been
working toward!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? I thought this performance was just a
side show for the main event...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You two aren't even listening...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, everyooone! The three of us
are about to make this beat soar!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa, Special Week, and Grass
Wonder's quickly assembled unit takes the stage
and the event's concert is a huge success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little later...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Next up, how about a chat with all of
us?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This event's been a huge success so far, if I do say
so myself. But it must be said...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is all to kick off the start of the upcoming G1
series!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's right. There are a lot of big races coming
up in the fall!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And the three of us each have our own goals. El's
running in the Japan Cup—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No, no, no, Grass. My goal isn't the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It isn't?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The murmurs of the crowd grow loud. Everyone
was under the impression that El Condor Pasa was
aiming for the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let me ask everyone a question. My goal is to
become the strongest racer in the world... but
what does that mean?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Of course being number one amongst all the
world's strongest is a big part of it. But let's think
about it for a sec.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What if it turns out there are no strong
competitors at the Japan Cup?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Would I really be able to say I'm the world's
strongest in that case, even if I won? No! Not at
all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If I'm gonna become the world's strongest racer,
that means everyone around me has to be strong
too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Being the strongest in the world makes you a king
of kings! That means your opponents must also be
kings!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Lucky for me, I'm surrounded by the loveliest of
amigas.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Spe and Grass are among the strongest racers
from around the country.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But it's not enough! Not for me, and not for them!
We still haven't reached our final goal!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Just like our performance today, we're gonna
compete on the same stage, combine our
strengths, and shoot for the stars!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We're gonna become world-class... together!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've run a ton of races, I understand.
The rivalries you should focus on first are the
ones around you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Spe and Grass have gotten hella strong. Before I
can focus my energy on the world, I have to
surpass them!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna soar. After today, I'm off to the
Japan Cup, and then... the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Only after beating these two in both races can I
move on to challenge the rest of the world in an
overseas tour.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I gotta get out there and win! Only then can I call
myself the strongest racer in the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She really is an entertainer, and she harnesses all
of that talent in her speech.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She brings drama to the competition. This is the
style of a wrestler, and the style of El Condor
Pasa...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've got it, El! I'll go to the Japan Cup too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wanna beat the person who managed to beat Suzuka! I have to if I want to be the best Umamusume in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And I'll go to the Arima Kinen. I'll give it
everything I've got.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I knew this day would come eventually, El.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That's why I reached out to you when you were
struggling. For you, for me, and for both of our
futures.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I respect you, El, but I won't just let you fly off
overseas.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
By the will of the blue sky, I will be the one who
claims victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stage has been set. Or rather, El Condor Pasa
has set the stage with the help of everyone who
believes in her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fall and winter G1 series is going to be
intense—a high-level clash of rivals... and the
ultimate form of entertainment.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now it's time for the three of us to face off! Who
will come out on top? The Gutsy Girl from
Hokkaido, the Brazen Blue Ogre, or the
Unyielding Condor?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's get rrrrready to rrraaace!

text_block_list.name: Spe and Grass
text_block_list.text: Yeah!
